footer.description: A prestigious university dedicated to the development of the next generation of global leaders, thinkers, and creators.

registration.title: Intent Registration
registration.subtitle: Join our community and take the first step towards your professional future today.
registration.disclaimer: This is only an intent registration, it does not imply enrollment commitment.

academic.title: Academic Excellence
academic.p1: At Aseder, we pride ourselves on offering a rigorous and updated curriculum that responds to real-world demands. Our faculty are experts in their fields and are committed to your professional success.
academic.p2: We believe in active learning where theory meets practice in state-of-the-art laboratories and collaborative projects. Here you don't just learn, you create and transform.
academic.p3: Our faculties are designed to foster curiosity and innovation, providing students with the resources needed to research and lead significant changes in society.

career.title: Your Professional Future
career.p1: The transition to the professional world is a fundamental pillar of our training. We have strategic alliances with leading companies in the sector to ensure high-impact professional internships.
career.p2: Our graduates are recognized for their technical capacity and leadership skills. 95% of our students secure employment in their area of study in less than 6 months after graduation.
career.p3: We offer personalized career advice, exclusive job fairs, and access to a global alumni network that will open doors for you in any market in the world.

life.title: Student Life
life.p1: The university experience goes beyond the classroom. On our vibrant campus, you will find clubs, sports, and cultural activities that will enrich your personal and social growth.
life.p2: We foster a diverse and inclusive community where every voice counts. Participate in international seminars, entrepreneurship events, and research groups from your first semester.
